Tool 05 of 07

What Is Each Booked Job
Actually Costing You?

Most companies track leads. Very few know what it costs to book a real job. Enter your numbers and see your true cost per booked job, benchmarked against the top 25% in your trade.

Your Marketing Numbers Based on HVAC, roofing and plumbing benchmarks
Trade / Industry
Primary channel Benchmark your main source
Monthly marketing spend ads + agency fees combined
$
Inbound calls / leads per month all sources combined
Close rate % of calls that book a job
%
Industry average:28-35% · Top 25%: 50%+
Average job ticket Average revenue per booked job
$
Marketing Diagnostic Waiting for your numbers
📊

Most companies underestimate this by 30-60%.

They count cost per lead from the platform dashboard. But platform leads do not equal booked jobs. Your real cost is spend divided by jobs booked, not spend divided by leads received.

Your true cost per booked job
$0
Based on your inputs

Monthly spend-
Calls/leads per month-
Close rate-
Jobs booked per month-
Cost per lead-
Cost per booked job-

$0Avg: $-Top 25%: $-Your number
-
-

The gap between your current number and the top 25% tells you how much waste is sitting in your channel mix and close rate.

Get a Full Channel Breakdown - Audit

The audit shows cost per job by individual channel so you know which ones to scale and which to cut.
